title: PLC Programmer***
description:
This will be a 1-year contract position based in Jurong West.

Responsibilities

  • Gather customer requirements and propose feasible solutions.
  • Create Automation/Software/Electrical control technology to solve problems in manufacturing and supply chain.
  • Designing and troubleshooting machine electrical & control systems.
  • Create Programmable Logic Control program for automatic machine control & processes.
  • Software Integration
  • Support overall application lifecycle.
  • Site testing and system deployment.
  • Technical support and troubleshooting.
  • Installing special purpose machine or system.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma in Computer Science/Engineering, Electrical or relevant discipline
  • Minimum 2 years relevant working experience in machine assembly, manufacturing & automation
  • Experienced in PLC programming exp in using Beckhoff.
  • Proficient with C and Python programming
  • Able to translate research ideas into solutions.
  • Able to deliver under tight schedule.
  • Team player.
  • Possess research and engineering ethics.
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills.

Advantageous to have:

  • IEC 61131-3 standard.
  • Machine HMI programming.
  • Electrical control design.
  • Robot programming.
  • Industrial communication protocol like EtherCAT, Ethernet/IP, Profibus, Modbus and any others.
  • Autonomous vehicle.
  • Automation and manufacturing industry.

postedCompany.description:
ETHOS SEARCH ASSOCIATES PTE. LTD.

Our heritage began in 2003 as HR Connect. Over the years, we have earned the trust and confidence of our clients to grow into a reputable human capital management firm.  Ethos Search Associates now brings with us strong industry knowledge, a far-reaching network and a wide range of human capital solutions ranging from talent acquisition, retention and management.

At Ethos Search Associates, we are passionately committed to deliver a high standard of service that achieves results while building relationships that last.  Adopting a consultative approach, we dedicate time and resources to understand the needs of both our clients and candidates aspiring career growth. We listen, we connect and we identify the best solutions to accomplish the goals of our clients.

Today, Ethos Search Associates is led by a team of dedicated professional consultants with rich experience from a broad spectrum of industries and a commitment to exceed expectations. We are uniquely positioned to add value to your recruitment and job search needs. Get in touch with us to find out more!
